case_title: DE SOTO CAB COOPERATIVE CO. VS OSTROW, RICHARD et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE SOTO CAB COOPERATIVE CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OSTROW, RICHARD SAN FRANCISCO NEWSPAPER AGENCY DEFENDANT RICHARD OSTROW IS DISMISSED WITH WITH PREJUDICE ON 12/9/98, AS AN INDIVIDUAL DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,135.33 FILED BY DE SOTO CAB COOPERATIVE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT OSTROW, RICHARD SAN FRANCISCO NEWSPAPER AGENCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-08-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-16-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OSTROW, RICHARD
